prompt_inputs.goal: muscle gain and strength development for weightlifting

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals totaling approximately 2500 calories
Protein distributed across meals with minimum 30g per meal for optimal muscle synthesis
Macronutrient ratio approximately 40% protein, 40% carbohydrates, 20% fats
Plan is presented in concise, compact format suitable for quick daily reference
task_description: write consise and compact 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-focused athlete (weightlifter) requiring 2500 calories with specific protein distribution across 4-5 meals and macro-nutrient ratios for muscle recovery

prompt_inputs.restrictions: vegan, requires complete amino acid profile, needs iron and B12 considerations

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 2200 calories across breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All meals are vegan with complete protein sources (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds, grains) providing all 9 essential amino acids
Includes iron-rich foods (lentils, spinach, fortified cereals) and B12 supplementation or fortified foods explicitly mentioned
Plan is presented in concise, compact format suitable for single-day reference
task_description: write consise and compact 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary restriction (vegan soccer player) requiring 2200 calories while maintaining complete amino acid profiles and iron/B12 supplementation considerations

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - 3000+ calorie intake with carbohydrate loading and strategic hydration

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals and 2-3 snacks spanning one full day
Total daily calories meet or exceed 3000 with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of total intake
Hydration timing specified at minimum 4 intervals with water/electrolyte recommendations
Format is concise and compact (under 300 words) with clear meal times and portion sizes
task_description: write consise and compact 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration timing throughout the day
